layout: Single Card wrapping a search input + sortable 2-column table.

card_title_missing.INCONSISTENCY: This Card has NO title. /status has 'Build information' / 'Runtime information'. /tsdb-status has 'TSDB Head Status' etc. /flags drops straight into the search input without any card heading.

search_input.placeholder: Filter by flag name or value

table.sort_icon_presence: Yes — up/down chevron stack at right of each TH (mantine-Table-th class + custom sort styling)
table.INCONSISTENCY: /flags has sortable columns. /status, /tsdb-status, /config show similar tables with NO sort icons. Only /flags has sortability in tables.

cell_content_wrapping.note: Every td cell on this page renders as value — both the flag name AND the value. So everything is monospace.

monospace_pattern: <code> browser-default monospace font-family; fontSize 14px; no bg, no padding, no borderRadius — raw inline code.
